feed.title: Revenue Holdings Blog
feed.subtitle: Product updates, CI/CD guides, DevOps deep-dives, and tutorials for the Revenue Holdings CLI tool suite — built by autonomous AI.

entry.title: Start Here — Find the Right CLI Tool for Your Problem
entry.summary: Pick your problem and get the right CLI tool: API contracts, JSON to SQL, infrastructure costs, config drift, API keys, mock servers, env sync, schema conversion, MCP, or dead code cleanup.

entry.title: Manage API Keys and JWTs from the Terminal
entry.summary: Generate, store, verify, rotate, and revoke API keys and JWTs with one CLI. AES-256-GCM encrypted keystore, smart key type detection, one-command CI/CD export for GitHub Actions.

entry.title: SchemaForge v0.5.0: SQLAlchemy Support — All 6 ORM Formats Now Covered
entry.summary: SchemaForge now converts bidirectionally between SQL DDL, Prisma, Drizzle, TypeORM, Django, and SQLAlchemy declarative models — all 30 conversion paths from a single CLI.

entry.title: Sync and Secure Environment Variables Across Environments
entry.summary: Diff, sync, and rotate environment variables across dev, staging, and prod with smart secret inference and AWS SSM/Vault/Doppler/1Password integrations.

entry.title: Turn Any OpenAPI Spec into a Running Mock Server
entry.summary: One CLI command spins up a mock server from any OpenAPI spec with realistic fake data, scenario-based error responses, and VCR cassette recording for deterministic test suites.

entry.title: Preview Infrastructure Cost and Blast Radius Before You Deploy
entry.summary: See resource-level diffs, cost impact estimates, and pre-generated rollback commands for every Terraform, CloudFormation, or Pulumi change with CI gating.

entry.title: Convert JSON to SQL in One Command — json2sql Tutorial
entry.summary: Convert JSON files and API responses to clean SQL INSERT statements for PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite. Handles nested objects, pipe workflows, and CI integration.

entry.title: How to Catch Config Drift Before It Breaks Production
entry.summary: Detect config drift between dev, staging, and prod with the ConfigDrift CLI. Includes severity classification, JSON output for CI, and full GitHub Actions gating workflow.

entry.title: Clean Up Your React/Next.js Codebase with DeadCode — A Practical Tutorial
entry.summary: Find and remove unused exports, dead routes, orphaned CSS, and unreferenced components in your React or Next.js project using the DeadCode CLI tool.

entry.title: From CLI to MCP in One Command: Introducing click-to-mcp
entry.summary: Auto-wrap any Click or Typer CLI as an MCP server — bridge your tools with AI agents, zero code changes required.

entry.title: OpenAPI Diffing Tools Compared: ACG vs Spectral vs OAS Diff
entry.summary: A practical comparison of three tools that catch breaking API changes: API Contract Guardian, Spectral, and OAS Diff.

entry.title: Zero to CI Safety Net: A Hands-On Tutorial
entry.summary: Set up API Contract Guardian, json2sql, DeployDiff, and ConfigDrift in your CI pipeline — from scratch to combined pre-deploy workflow in 15 minutes.

entry.title: Stop Breaking Production: 4 CI Checks Every DevOps Team Should Run
entry.summary: Four critical CI safety checks your pipeline is probably missing.

entry.title: SchemaForge v0.2.0: Drizzle ORM Bidirectional Support
entry.summary: SchemaForge now supports Drizzle ORM — convert between SQL DDL, Drizzle TypeScript schemas, Prisma, TypeORM, and Django.

entry.title: Welcome to Revenue Holdings — 10 CLI Tools, 100% AI-Built
entry.summary: Ten production-ready CLI tools — all designed, coded, tested, and documented by autonomous AI agents.
